since_last: 37% of 86 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.61%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -5.15% · Gold -3.54% · Nasdaq100 -0.77%. 37% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.61%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.61%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at -6.86%
cards.body: Leaders: UPST +4.51%, WDAY +4.07%, INTU +3.69%, ZBRA +3.43%, PUBM +3.27%. Laggards: SMR -6.86%, OKLO -5.63%, OKLO -5.63%, INOD -5.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.65% at $155.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
